summary: Execute Rwanda Revenue Authority follow-up call now to secure a 30-minute discovery/demo; if no connect, email immediately; fully log in CRM within 60 minutes.
reasoning: This is the highest-impact overdue revenue task, it is within Kigali business hours, the sales agent is idle, and CRM shows missing company/deal records. Prior directives remain unexecuted—acting now advances pipeline and clears backlog.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call now (Kigali/CAT) to book 30-minute discovery/demo; email if no connect; log in CRM
task.description:
Execute the existing RRA follow-up playbook with these checkpoints:
1) CRM prep (5–10 min): Create the Rwanda Revenue Authority company and a new deal (stage: Discovery/Qualification) if missing; link the existing contact; attach prior notes.
2) Call now (within 08:30–17:30 CAT): Dial the primary contact immediately. If no answer, leave voicemail (if available) and within 10 minutes attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard.
3) On live connect: Confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance steps; handle objections; secure a 30-minute discovery/demo this week and send the calendar invite before ending the call.
4) If no connect: Send a concise follow-up email within 10 minutes proposing three 30-minute Kigali-time slots over the next 3 business days; include a clear agenda, one-pager, and a relevant case study; cc known stakeholders.
5) CRM logging: Record all call attempts, voicemail, and the email with outcomes. If the meeting is booked, update the deal (stage: Discovery Scheduled) and attach the invite. If not booked, schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted.
6) Data gaps: If numbers are invalid or email bounces, list the exact gaps and hand off to the research agent for enrichment.
7) Status update: Post a brief summary of attempts, outcomes, and next steps within 60 minutes.
